name: Sand dune
description: Top-down sand. 16x16 base with subtle ripple lines and grain speckles.
rule_summary: Base sand, then 2-3 broken horizontal ripple lines (slightly wavy), plus subtle grain speckles. Almost monochromatic (only 3 close shades).

layers.name: GUIDE
layers.purpose: Suggested ripple lines (rule of thirds vertically).

layers.name: ripples
layers.purpose: Wavy darker lines, broken into 3-5 segments each.

layers.name: grain
layers.purpose: Sparse 1px speckles, both lighter and darker.
